name: djungle-agent-os
description: Connect Claude to the Djungle Agent OS. v4.0.1: dual auth (JWT OAuth + API key via Bearer aos_xxx generata dal Self-Service Portal). v4.0 Self-Service Portal con magic link signup. Endpoint canonico agents-api.djungle.io (custom domain stabile, prima branch-alias). v3.5.0 base: agents/modules/capabilities/knowledge in Supabase canonico, marketplace cross-tenant, skill /agent + /marketplace.
